fields.label: API Login
fields.description: DataForSEO API login used as the Basic Auth username. Find it in the API Access page after signing in: https://app.dataforseo.com/api-access.

fields.label: API Password
fields.description: DataForSEO API password used as the Basic Auth password. Generate or view it in the API Access page after signing in: https://app.dataforseo.com/api-access.

actions.name: backlinks_anchors_live
actions.description: Retrieve DataForSEO Backlinks anchor text metrics for a domain, subdomain, or page.

target.description: Domain, subdomain, or absolute page URL sent to DataForSEO Backlinks.

backlinksStatusType.description: Backlink status type used for metrics.

includeSubdomains.description: Whether subdomains of the target are included.

excludeInternalBacklinks.description: Whether internal backlinks from subdomains are excluded.

rankScale.description: Scale used for backlink rank metrics.

tag.description: User-defined task tag passed through to DataForSEO.

offset.description: Offset in the returned results array.

items.description: A nested JSON array item.
A JSON value accepted by DataForSEO for filters or options.
One sorting rule.

internalListLimit.description: Maximum number of elements in internal aggregate arrays.

items.description: A nested JSON array item.
A JSON value accepted by DataForSEO for filters or options.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving DataForSEO Backlinks anchors.

time.description: Task execution time reported by DataForSEO.

cost.description: Task cost in USD reported by DataForSEO.

result_count.description: Number of result objects returned by the task.

task.description: Metadata for the first DataForSEO task returned by the endpoint.

items.description: One result object returned by DataForSEO.

anyOf.description: Result objects returned by DataForSEO for the first task.

outputSchema.description: Normalized DataForSEO Backlinks Anchors Live output.

actions.name: get_user_data
actions.description: Retrieve DataForSEO account details, balance, rates, limits, and usage data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving DataForSEO user data.

login.description: DataForSEO API login for the account.

timezone.description: Timezone configured in the DataForSEO profile.

anyOf.description: Account spending and balance details returned by DataForSEO.
API rate information returned by DataForSEO.
API limit information returned by DataForSEO.
API usage statistics returned by DataForSEO.

outputSchema.description: Normalized account details returned by the DataForSEO User Data endpoint.

actions.name: google_ads_search_volume_live

locationName.description: Full name of the location to target in DataForSEO.

locationCode.description: Numeric DataForSEO location code to target.

items.description: One result object returned by DataForSEO.
